reference_answer: Access badge AB-47 became effective on 2026-10-03 at 08:00.
AB-47 stopped being active on 2026-10-10 at 18:00.
AB-47 was active for seven days and ten hours.
During the active interval, AB-47's status was limited to supervised calibration-room entry.
After the active interval ended, AB-47's status changed to inactive.
The renewal request was due by 2026-10-08 at 12:00.
